summary: Real-sh run of the actual lib asserts credential_path/outfitter/profiles is_dir on a path the test never pre-creates (only interactive setup_pi_auth is stubbed, which can only cause false failure); rejects missing-dir, file-at-path, and wrong-path violations and fails today against the outfitter-less dispatch; only the preserve-a-preexisting-dir edge of 'leave present' is untested.
